violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Single service items (aluminum pans) are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. PIC relocated pans and stored properly. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Observed ceiling tiles in the kitchen area in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2025
The floor & walls in the mop sink area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The floor & walls in the mop sink area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The floor and walls in the mop sink area are in poor repair (wood exposed and damaged). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
